bridge.note: Exact unsupported span requires CAD feature metadata or slicer path analysis.

fillet.note: Confirm load-path transitions in STEP/CAD; STL cannot prove design intent.

stress_concentration.note: FEA or physical load testing is required for final approval.

layer_direction.note: Confirm primary load is not opening layer interfaces.

automated_scope: Geometry and slicer heuristics only; engineering approval remains manual.
